description: Capstone Energy+, Inc. provides customized microgrid solutions, on-site resilient energy-as-a-service (EaaS) solutions, and on-site energy technology systems. The company's solutions include stationary distributed power generation applications and distribution networks, including cogeneration, integrated combined heat and power, renewable energy, natural resources, and critical power supply, as well as combined cooling, heat, and power. Its inverter-based technologies solve resiliency by connecting to the electric grid or be the backbone of a localized microgrid; energy conversion products inc
